summary: All four requirements appear to be implemented in the diff. REQ-1 is addressed by replacing CSS variable classes with explicit bg-zinc-900/text-white Tailwind classes across TotalOrdersTab, ReadyTab, HallmarkTab, and KarigarsTab. REQ-2 is addressed in TotalOrdersTab and KarigarsTab by building a live karigar name map from design mappings. REQ-3 is addressed in KarigarsTab with a handleKarigarClick that URL-encodes the karigar name and navigates to /karigar/$name, and in KarigarDetail.tsx which decodes the name. REQ-4 is addressed in ReadyTab with Excel/PDF/JPEG export buttons and handlers.
